body:
angels1ut:

there’s something so special about a woman that is sweet, caring, loving, attentive, supportive, honest and also extremely kinky. like ?? how are you going to kiss my forehead and help me put on my shoes and braid my hair and bring me sweet treats but in the next breath you’re slamming me against a wall and cutting off my air supply ????? will you marry me
